8. ! [X0] : (starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three) | ~piloted_on(badu,bbc_three) | ~starred_in(X0,badu)) [flattening 7]
9. ! [X0] : (~member_of_pappy(X0) | (~starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_two) & ~starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three))) [ennf transformation 6]

11. member_of_pappy(p1) [cnf transformation 2]
12. starred_in(p1,badu) [cnf transformation 3]
13. starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three) | ~piloted_on(badu,bbc_three) | ~starred_in(X0,badu) [cnf transformation 8]
14. ~starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three) | ~member_of_pappy(X0) [cnf transformation 9]
17. 1 <=> piloted_on(badu,bbc_three) [avatar definition]
21. 2 <=> ! [X0] : (starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three) | ~starred_in(X0,badu)) [avatar definition]
22. ~starred_in(X0,badu) | starred_in_show_piloting_on(X0,bbc_three) <- (2) [avatar component clause 21]
23. ~1 | 2 [avatar split clause 13,21,17]
24. 1 [avatar split clause 10,17]
25. starred_in_show_piloting_on(p1,bbc_three) <- (2) [resolution 22,12]
26. ~member_of_pappy(p1) <- (2) [resolution 25,14]
27. $false <- (2) [forward subsumption resolution 26,11]
28. ~2 [avatar contradiction clause 27]
s1. ~1 | 2 [sat_conversion 23]
s2. 1 [sat_conversion 24]

s4. # [rat s1,s3,s2]
